title: PNAPBR
description: A 16x PBR pack based on vanilla textures, mostly complete towards later versions.
body:
A mostly complete WIP project in progress for over 3 years
Based on vanilla textures, it is a 16x PBR overlay resource pack for use with shaders
I also recommend to use VanillaAccurate 16x underneath
A reason to download this pack is it is one of the few mostly complete 16x resourcepacks.

Features:
-Pom
-Normals
-Specular
-Emission
-CTM
-And More

Requires full CTM support.

Showcase Video:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=R2w1Am5ZrqE
